div.p: State transitions after Stage 4 containment check passes

g.title: First stat() call — checks type of resolved path
Appends /index.html to canonical directory path
Re-canonicalize: follows symlinks in index.html itself
Mandatory re-check: index.html symlink might escape doc_root
Re-stat after realpath() on index.html — TOCTOU window opens here

div.p: TOCTOU Window Between stat() and open() a file could be deleted or replaced. Acceptable here: attacker cannot place a malicious file inside doc_root via this race without already having write access — in which case the server is already compromised. realpath() + prefix check closes the symlink vector; only the race on the file itself remains, which is low-risk for a static file server.

g.title: canonical is confirmed: regular file inside doc_root, stat() populated
stat() failed with EACCES or other non-ENOENT error
stat() failed with ENOENT — path does not exist
ENOENT from realpath on index path → 403 not 404: prevents info leak about directory structure
Security: index.html is a symlink pointing outside doc_root
Rare: file existed during realpath() but was deleted before stat()

div.p: Security invariant: ENOENT from realpath(index_path) always returns 403, never 404. Returning 404 would reveal that /secret_dir/index.html does not exist — information about the filesystem structure the client must not receive.

g.title: First stat() call — checks type of resolved path
Appends /index.html to canonical directory path
Re-canonicalize: follows symlinks in index.html itself
Mandatory re-check: index.html symlink might escape doc_root
Re-stat after realpath() on index.html — TOCTOU window opens here
canonical is confirmed: regular file inside doc_root, stat() populated
stat() failed with EACCES or other non-ENOENT error
stat() failed with ENOENT — path does not exist
ENOENT from realpath on index path → 403 not 404: prevents info leak about directory structure
Security: index.html is a symlink pointing outside doc_root
Rare: file existed during realpath() but was deleted before stat()
